items.title: How can I create folders and items in KHub?
items.description: Only users having the editor role will be able to create folders and items in KHub

items.title: How can I view KHub Analytics?
items.description: Only the users who have an editor role can view KHub analytics

items.title: Knowledge Hub
items.description: A searchable library of reference content for in-the-moment lookup.

items.title: Understanding recent, trending and latest KHub items
items.description: Once a document is uploaded in the KHub by the EDITOR, it is then available for all the team members to search and access it.

items.title: What is KHub?
items.description: KHub is a knowledge/content repository for your employees to help them excel at their job.
